title: Exercises for Act II

visual_sequence.observation: The exercise chapter is organized by construct, measure, compare, perturb.
Different projections are compared by their metric distortion.
A scale field tests whether coordinates are conformal.
The torus supplies positive, negative, and zero curvature regions.
A Mobius map carries geodesics between models.
